meaning: 福法尔郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: Grace Darling and her father rowed out to rescue the crew of the SS Forfarshire in a violent storm.
Grace Darling received national attention in 1838 when she rowed out to help survivors of the shipwrecked SS Forfarshire during a storm.
He became their youngest player when he made an appearance against Brechin City in a Forfarshire Cup tie, but he left to join Shire in 2008.
